questions.question: 'hospital' 的中文意思是 '医院'。
questions.explanation: hospital是指医院，是本单元核心场所词汇。

questions.question: 'next to' 表示在...后面。
questions.explanation: next to 表示紧邻、在...旁边，而 behind 才是后面。

questions.question: 'turn left' 是左转的意思。
questions.explanation: turn left 是固定短语，表示左转。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问地点与路线的句型
questions.question: 询问 '书店在哪？' 可以说 'Where is the bookstore?'
questions.explanation: Where is the... 是询问地点位置的标准句型。

questions.question: 'Go straight' 意为向右转。
questions.explanation: Go straight 表示直行。

questions.question: I want to buy some books. I can go to the ______.
questions.explanation: 买书应该去书店(bookstore)。

questions.question: The post office is ______ the cinema. They are side by side.
questions.explanation: side by side 描述的是相邻关系，用 next to。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问地点与路线的句型
questions.question: ______ is the science museum?
questions.explanation: 询问地点位置用疑问词 Where。

questions.question: Turn left ______ the bookstore.
questions.explanation: 在某个地点转弯通常使用介词 at。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问地点与路线的句型
questions.question: How ______ I get to the museum?
questions.explanation: How can I get there? 是询问路线的标准句型。

questions.question: I'm hungry. Is there a ______ near here?
questions.explanation: 饿了需要去餐馆(restaurant)。

questions.question: The park is ______ to the library.
questions.explanation: 固定搭配 next to。

questions.question: You can see many robots in the science ______.
questions.explanation: 科学博物馆(science museum)里有机器人。

questions.question: Turn right at the first ______.
questions.explanation: at the crossing意为在十字路口。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问地点与路线的句型
questions.question: Is there a cinema near here? Yes, ______.
questions.explanation: Is there 引导的一般疑问句，肯定回答用 Yes, there is。

questions.question: You can send letters in the ______ office.
questions.explanation: post office 指邮局。

questions.question: Go ______ and you can find it.
questions.explanation: go straight 直行。

questions.question: The hospital is ______ the bookstore. (在...后面)
questions.explanation: behind 表示在...后面。

questions.question: We can see a film in the ______.
questions.explanation: cinema 指电影院。

questions.question: Match the words with Chinese meanings.
questions.explanation: museum-博物馆, bookstore-书店, hospital-医院, cinema-电影院。

questions.question: Match the phrases with Chinese meanings.
questions.explanation: turn left-左转, go straight-直行, next to-在旁边, far from-离...远(此处D对应逻辑余项)。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问地点与路线的句型
questions.question: Arrange the words to make a sentence.
questions.explanation: 疑问词+系动词+地点，询问博物馆在哪。

questions.question: Arrange the words to make a sentence.
questions.explanation: 祈使句型：动词短语+地点状语。

questions.question: 在英语中，'post office' 专门指警察局。
questions.explanation: post office 是邮局，警察局是 police station。

questions.question: 'The bookstore is near the school.' 意思是书店在学校附近。
questions.explanation: near 意为在...附近。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问地点与路线的句型
questions.question: 回答 'How can I get there?' 应该用指路的动作指令。
questions.explanation: 该句型询问路程，回复应是 turn left/right 等指令。

questions.question: 'Next to' 和 'Beside' 在描述方位时意思相近。
questions.explanation: 两者都表示在...旁边。

questions.question: 'Crossing' 的意思是十字路口。
questions.explanation: crossing 本单元核心词汇，指转弯所在的交叉路口。

questions.question: There are many interesting things in the ______.
questions.explanation: 博物馆里有很多有趣的事物。

questions.question: The science museum is ______ the bookstore.
questions.explanation: 在此四个介词中，表示方位关系的只有 behind。

questions.question: ______ at the hospital and go straight.
questions.explanation: 指路场景使用祈使句 Turn right。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问地点与路线的句型
questions.question: How can I ______ the cinema?
questions.explanation: get to + 地点表示到达某地。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问地点与路线的句型
questions.question: Where is the post office? It's ______ the school.
questions.explanation: next to 是固定搭配，表示在...旁边。

questions.question: Turn left at the ______. You'll see a park.
questions.explanation: 在十字路口(crossing)左转。

questions.question: Is there a ______? Yes, I want to watch a movie.
questions.explanation: 看电影去电影院(cinema)。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问地点与路线的句型
questions.question: Excuse me, ______ is the library?
questions.explanation: 问路礼貌语 Excuse me 后接 Where 问地点。

questions.question: The restaurant is near ______ bookstore.
questions.explanation: 特指具体的书店，通常用定冠词 the。

questions.question: Go ______. It's on your left.
questions.explanation: Go straight 表示一直往前走。

questions.question: Robin is at the science ______.
questions.explanation: 博物馆的拼写是 museum。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问地点与路线的句型
questions.question: ______ is the hospital?
questions.explanation: 句首单词填空且为疑问词表示在哪里。

questions.question: Turn ______ at the school and you'll see it on the right.
questions.explanation: turn left 核心短语。

questions.question: Go straight at the ______.
questions.explanation: crossing 指十字路口。

questions.question: Match directions and prepositions.
questions.explanation: next to-旁边, behind-后面, near-附近, straight-直的。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问地点与路线的句型
questions.question: Match sentences.
questions.explanation: Where is it-在哪儿, Turn right-右转, Get to-到达, Is there-有没有。

questions.question: Arrange the words: ["is", "to", "It", "next", "the", "hospital"]
questions.explanation: 主语+系动词+方位介词短语。

questions.knowledge_point: 询问地点与路线的句型
questions.question: Arrange the words: ["can", "How", "get", "I", "there"]
questions.explanation: 我该如何到达那里？标准问路句式。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 识别并正确书写城市生活中的关键建筑物名称。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: science museum, post office, bookstore, cinema, hospital
common_mistakes: museum 拼写错误 (多写或少写字母)
post office 漏写中间的空格
knowledge_summary.tips: museum 可以联想 memory 记忆，都是关于知识的地方。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 使用介词描述物体间的空间位置关系。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: Next to (紧邻), Behind (后面), Near (附近)
common_mistakes: 在 ... 前面使用 in front of 容易记错顺序
knowledge_summary.tips: next to 的 to 永远不能丢，表示 '紧挨着'。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 利用 Where 句型和 How 句型询问目的地位置及路线。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: Where is the + 地点? / How can I get to the + 地点?
common_mistakes: How can I get to there (there 前面不加 to)
Is there a... 回答时把 yes 和 no 搞混
knowledge_summary.tips: 地点前面通常要加 the，因为询问的是某个特定的地点。

knowledge_summary.core_concept: 使用祈使句给他人指明行进路线。
knowledge_summary.key_formula: Turn left/right at the... / Go straight
common_mistakes: Turn right at the... 习惯性在 straight 后面加 to
把 crossing (名词路口) 和 cross (动词穿过) 混淆
knowledge_summary.tips: 指路时要简明扼要，动词开头不加主语。
